title_en: Time of Day, Knowing, and Speaking Languages
petrov_stage: Make time-of-day and knowing-language statements automatic.
petrov_mission: Say when something happens, whether you know it, and what language you can or cannot speak.
focus_targets: Time roots become parts of day with 上
知道 and 吗 build a practical check-in question
明白了 marks a completed change of understanding

listening_tasks.prompt: Listen for one of these lesson anchors and identify the intent: 当然, 早, 晚, 早上.
Listen to a line that uses Time roots become parts of day with 上 and 知道 and 吗 build a practical check-in question and repeat the key detail correctly.

reading_tasks.prompt: Match these lesson items to their meanings: 当然, 早, 晚, 早上.
Rebuild one short sentence that uses Time roots become parts of day with 上 with one lesson vocabulary item.

speaking_tasks.prompt: Say when something happens, whether you know it, and what language you can or cannot speak.
Say in Chinese: Do you know?

rapid_recall: Recall and say: 当然, 早, 晚, 早上, 晚上.
Translate into Chinese: I do not know.
mock_pass_criteria: Uses at least two of these lesson anchors correctly: 当然, 早, 晚.
Produces one correct spoken line using Time roots become parts of day with 上.
Answers one follow-up without dropping completely out of Chinese.
